content.text:
Initialized the vault context.

- Read the project purpose and wiki schema.
- Detected an existing information-retrieval knowledge base centered on [[BM25]], [[TF-IDF]], [[IDF]], [[RAG]], [[混合检索]], and [[重排序]].
- Will use `[[Note Name]]` wikilinks whenever referencing vault notes.
- Will leave a blank line before every Markdown table.
- Will preserve the existing uncommitted changes in `.llm-wiki/` and `.obsidian/` unless you ask me to modify them.

Ready for your next task.
/init 生成md代码块时遵循MathJax格式
I’ll inspect the repository layout and recent commit style, then create a concise `AGENTS.md` tailored to this Obsidian-based wiki.

content.title:
printf '%s
' '--- top-level files ---' && find . -maxdepth 2 -type f ! -path './.git/*' ! -path './.llm-wiki/*' ! -path './.obsidian/*' | sort && printf '%s
' '--- wiki directory structure ---' && find wiki -maxdepth 2 -type d -print | sort && printf '%s
' '--- recent commits ---' && git log --oneline -10 && printf '%s
' '--- example note ---' && sed -n '1,180p' wiki/concepts/BM25.md && printf '%s
' '--- index/log ---' && sed -n '1,160p' wiki/index.md && sed -n '1,120p' wiki/log.md

content.title:
cat > AGENTS.md <<'EOF'
# Repository Guidelines

## Project Structure & Module Organization

This repository is an Obsidian knowledge vault, not an application codebase. Write curated notes under `wiki/` and keep original materials in `raw/`.

- `wiki/concepts/`: techniques and terminology, such as [[concepts/BM25]].
- `wiki/entities/`: named tools, organizations, people, and datasets.
- `wiki/sources/`: source notes for papers, articles, talks, and books.
- `wiki/queries/`: unresolved research questions.
- `wiki/comparisons/` and `wiki/synthesis/`: side-by-side analysis and cross-source conclusions.
- `wiki/index.md` is the vault directory; `wiki/log.md` records activity in reverse chronological order.
- `schema.md` defines required metadata and page types; `purpose.md` records project scope.

## Authoring & Naming Conventions

Create Markdown files with lowercase `kebab-case.md` slugs where practical (for example, `chain-of-thought.md`); source notes use `author-year-slug.md`. Keep existing Chinese titles and filenames consistent when extending their topic area.

Every page begins with YAML frontmatter containing `type`, `title`, `tags`, `related`, `created`, and `updated` (`YYYY-MM-DD`). Source pages additionally include `authors`, `year`, `url`, and `venue`.

Use Obsidian Flavored Markdown. Reference vault notes with clickable wikilinks, e.g., [[BM25]] or [[concepts/BM25]]. Use `$...$` for inline math and `$$...$$` for display math. Leave one blank line before every Markdown table.

## Content Quality Checks

There is no build system or automated test suite. Before committing, manually check that:

- frontmatter matches the schema and dates are current;
- wikilinks resolve to the intended note;
- new concepts and entities appear in `wiki/index.md` with a one-line description;
- meaningful research activity is logged in `wiki/log.md`;
- claims distinguish source evidence from synthesis, and conflicting evidence is tracked through a query note.

## Commit & Pull Request Guidelines

The existing history uses short operational messages, e.g., `vault backup: 2026-07-14 00:14:11` and `reinitialize repository`. Use concise imperative messages that identify the vault change, such as `add BM25 source notes` or `update RAG synthesis`.

Keep pull requests focused. Include a brief summary, list the notes or sources changed, link any related query or issue, and mention manual link/frontmatter checks. Add screenshots only when a visual Obsidian rendering change needs review.
EOF
wc -w AGENTS.md && git diff --check && git diff -- AGENTS.md

content.text:
Created `AGENTS.md` as a 331-word contributor guide.

It covers:

- Vault structure and note locations
- Metadata, naming, Obsidian wikilink, math, and table-rendering conventions
- Manual content-quality checks in place of automated tests
- Commit style inferred from repository history
- Focused pull-request expectations

Validation completed with `git diff --check`; no whitespace errors were found.
将文件夹内所有的md代码块都变成MathJax格式
我会先扫描整个 vault 中的 `.md` 文件，区分普通代码围栏与 LaTeX/KaTeX 数学块；只把数学内容转换为 Obsidian 可识别的 MathJax 分隔符，避免破坏示例代码和 YAML。

content.title: Search *.md in ., Search \\\[|\\\] in ., Search \\begin\{|\\end\{ in ., Search ^``` in ., Search \\\(|\\\) in .

command:
printf '%s
' '--- Markdown files ---' && find . -type f -name '*.md' ! -path './.git/*' | sort && printf '%s
' '--- Display-math delimiters (\[ / \]) ---' && rg -n -U -g '*.md' '\\[|\\]' . || true && printf '%s
' '--- LaTeX environments ---' && rg -n -g '*.md' '\begin\{|\end\{' . || true && printf '%s
' '--- Fenced blocks ---' && rg -n -g '*.md' '^```' . || true && printf '%s
' '--- Inline delimiters (\( / \)) ---' && rg -n -g '*.md' '\\(|\\)' . || true

content.title: Search \\\[|\\\] in ., Search \\begin\{|\\end\{ in ., Search ^``` in ., Search \\\(|\\\) in ., Search ^\$\$|\$[^$] in .

command:
printf '%s
' '--- Display-math delimiters (\[ / \]) ---' && grep -RInE '\\[|\\]' --include='*.md' . || true && printf '%s
' '--- LaTeX environments ---' && grep -RInE '\begin\{|\end\{' --include='*.md' . || true && printf '%s
' '--- Fenced blocks ---' && grep -RIn '^```' --include='*.md' . || true && printf '%s
' '--- Inline delimiters (\( / \)) ---' && grep -RInE '\\(|\\)' --include='*.md' . || true && printf '%s
' '--- Dollar delimiters ---' && grep -RInE '^\$\$|\$[^$]' --include='*.md' . || true

content.text: 扫描确认：数学内容目前使用 `\(...\)` 与 `\[...\]`，而代码围栏主要是 YAML、JSON、文本示例，并非数学。现在将仅转换这些 LaTeX 数学分隔符为 `$...$` 和 `$$...$$`，保留普通代码围栏不变。

content.title:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re

changed = []
for path in Path('.').rglob('*.md'):
    if '.git' in path.parts:
        continue

    original = path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    parts = re.split(r'(^```.*?^```\s*$)', original, flags=re.MULTILINE | re.DOTALL)
    for index in range(0, len(parts), 2):
        text = parts[index]
        text = re.sub(r'\\\[\s*\n?', '$$\n', text)
        text = re.sub(r'\n?\s*\\\]', '\n$$', text)
        text = re.sub(r'\\\((.+?)\\\)', r'$\1$', text, flags=re.DOTALL)
        parts[index] = text

    updated = ''.join(parts)
    if updated != original:
        path.write_text(updated, encoding='utf-8')
        changed.append(str(path))

print('\n'.join(changed))
print(f'Converted {len(changed)} file(s).')
PY
printf '%s\n' '--- Remaining legacy math delimiters outside code fences ---'
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re
matches = []
for path in Path('.').rglob('*.md'):
    if '.git' in path.parts:
        continue
    in_fence = False
    for line_no, line in enumerate(path.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines(), 1):
        if line.startswith('```'):
            in_fence = not in_fence
            continue
        if not in_fence and re.search(r'\\\[|\\\]|\\\(|\\\)', line):
            matches.append(f'{path}:{line_no}:{line}')
print('\n'.join(matches) if matches else 'None')
PY
printf '%s\n' '--- Changed files ---'
git diff --name-only -- '*.md'
printf '%s\n' '--- Whitespace check ---'
git diff --check

content.text:
已完成数学格式转换：

- 将全部 `.md` 文件中、普通代码围栏之外的 `\(...\)` 转为 `$...$`。
- 将 `\[...\]` 转为 `$$...$$`。
- 保留 YAML、JSON、`text` 等非数学代码块，避免破坏示例内容。
- 共更新 6 个文件，包括 [[BM25]]、[[IDF]] 与相关查询、来源笔记及原始来源文件。
- 已复查：没有遗留的旧式 `\(`、`\)`、`\[` 或 `\]` 数学分隔符。
- 已运行空白检查，未发现 Markdown whitespace 问题。
